examples: The blades are now being tested in the Netherlands, and the drivetrain in Norway.
The BMW i3 will feature a fully electric drivetrain with an extended range of up to 140 miles per charge.
The inline, super-efficient twin-belt drivetrain features oversized pulleys with optimum 1.7 internal ratio.
Extended time is spent exploring the handling nuances of different drivetrain configurations (front, rear and all-wheel drive).
The report claims that German automakers are also unhappy, because diesels are not included for alternative drivetrain credit.
